# Deploy AlfredOS on Railway

AI-First Business OS for solopreneurs

[![Deploy on Railway](https://railway.com/button.svg)](https://railway.com/deploy/alfredos)

## About

AlfredOS is designed to run on Railway's modern infrastructure, providing a seamless deployment experience with automatic scaling, SSL certificates, and zero-downtime deployments. The template handles all the complex configuration so you can focus on running your business.

Railway provides enterprise-grade hosting with:
- **Automatic SSL** - Secure HTTPS for all your services
- **Global CDN** - Fast access from anywhere in the world
- **Auto-scaling** - Grows with your business needs
- **Persistent Storage** - Your data is safely stored and backed up
- **Custom Domains** - Use your own domain names
- **Team Collaboration** - Invite team members as you grow

Typical hosting costs start at $5-20/month depending on usage, replacing $1,000+/month in SaaS subscriptions.

## What gets deployed

| Service | Source | Type |
|---------|--------|------|
| Worker-8aic | `n8nio/n8n` | Worker |
| Redis-4NkZ | `bitnami/redis` | Database |
| Cal | `calcom/cal.com` | Web service |
| Postgres-7N1f | `postgres:16-alpine` | Database |
| ragapi | `ghcr.io/danny-avila/librechat-rag-api-dev-lite:latest` | Web service |
| meilisearch | `getmeili/meilisearch:v1.11.3` | Database |
| MySQL | `mysql` | Database |
| Postgres-wNUa | `ghcr.io/railwayapp-templates/postgres-ssl` | Database |
| Primary-0gPD | `n8nio/n8n` | Web service |
| Ghost API config | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.16` | Web service |
| NocoDB | `nocodb/nocodb` | Web service |
| ghost | `ghost:alpine` | Web service |
| vectordb | `pgvector/pgvector:pg16` | Database |
| n8n API config | `ghcr.io/railwayapp/function-bun:1.2.16` | Web service |
| Redis-8xdz | `bitnami/redis` | Database |
| mongodb | `mongo` | Database |
| Alfred | [lumberjack-so/alfred_terminal](https://github.com/lumberjack-so/alfred_terminal) | Web service |
| Postgres | `ghcr.io/railwayapp-templates/postgres-ssl:16` | Database |

## Environment variables

| Variable | Service | Default |
| --------- | ------- | ------- |
| `PORT` | Worker-8aic | 5678 |
| `DB_TYPE` | Worker-8aic | postgresdb |
| `NODE_OPTIONS` | Worker-8aic | --max_old_space_size=8192 |
| `EXECUTIONS_MODE` | Worker-8aic | queue |
| `DB_POSTGRESDB_USER` | Worker-8aic | (secret) |
| `N8N_LISTEN_ADDRESS` | Worker-8aic | :: |
| `N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED` | Worker-8aic | true |
| `DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD` | Worker-8aic | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_PASSWORD` | Worker-8aic | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_USERNAME` | Worker-8aic | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_DUALSTACK` | Worker-8aic | true |
| `ENABLE_ALPINE_PRIVATE_NETWORKING` | Worker-8aic | true |
| `OFFLOAD_MANUAL_EXECUTIONS_TO_WORKERS` | Worker-8aic | true |
| `N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS` | Worker-8aic | true |
| `REDISUSER` | Redis-4NkZ | default |
| `REDISPASSWORD` | Redis-4NkZ | (secret) |
| `REDIS_PASSWORD` | Redis-4NkZ | (secret) |
| `EMAIL_FROM` | Cal | alfred@alfredos.dev |
| `NEXTAUTH_SECRET` | Cal | (secret) |
| `EMAIL_SERVER_HOST` | Cal | smtp.mailgun.org |
| `EMAIL_SERVER_PORT` | Cal | 465 |
| `EMAIL_SERVER_USER` | Cal | (secret) |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT` | Cal | 55828a4bd60062912709f456f5b3a66329c2ce10cfe7adb3216f4aec900acb072e131c4441ec01711a76e865487aea896b663ada7db5f9c5d582eead73e1f1fc53f3c9eddfe6bd1548d458fd24988ef9 |
| `GOOGLE_LOGIN_ENABLED` | Cal | (secret) |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_NAME` | Cal | Cal.com |
| `EMAIL_SERVER_PASSWORD` | Cal | (secret) |
| `GOOGLE_API_CREDENTIALS` | Cal | (secret) |
| `NEXT_PUBLIC_DISABLE_SIGNUP` | Cal | false |
| `NPM_CONFIG_UPDATE_NOTIFIER` | Cal | false |
| `POSTGRES_DB` | Postgres-7N1f | railway |
| `POSTGRES_USER` | Postgres-7N1f | (secret) |
| `PGPORT_PRIVATE` | Postgres-7N1f | 5432 |
| `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` | Postgres-7N1f | (secret) |
| `PORT` | ragapi | 8000 |
| `DB_PORT` | ragapi | 5432 |
| `JWT_SECRET` | ragapi | (secret) |
| `DEBUG_RAG_API` | ragapi | false |
| `POSTGRES_USER` | ragapi | (secret) |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | ragapi | (secret) |
| `EMBEDDINGS_MODEL` | ragapi | text-embedding-3-small |
| `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` | ragapi | (secret) |
| `EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER` | ragapi | openai |
| `MEILI_ENV` | meilisearch | production |
| `MEILI_DB_PATH` | meilisearch | /meili_data/data.ms |
| `MEILI_HTTP_ADDR` | meilisearch | :::7700 |
| `MEILI_NO_ANALYTICS` | meilisearch | true |
| `MYSQLUSER` | MySQL | root |
| `MYSQLPASSWORD` | MySQL | (secret) |
| `MYSQL_DATABASE` | MySQL | railway |
| `MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD` | MySQL | (secret) |
| `POSTGRES_DB` | Postgres-wNUa | railway |
| `POSTGRES_USER` | Postgres-wNUa | (secret) |
| `POSTGRES_PASSWORD` | Postgres-wNUa | (secret) |
| `PORT` | Primary-0gPD | 5678 |
| `DB_TYPE` | Primary-0gPD | postgresdb |
| `NODE_OPTIONS` | Primary-0gPD | --max_old_space_size=8192 |
| `EXECUTIONS_MODE` | Primary-0gPD | queue |
| `DB_POSTGRESDB_USER` | Primary-0gPD | (secret) |
| `N8N_LISTEN_ADDRESS` | Primary-0gPD | :: |
| `N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED` | Primary-0gPD | true |
| `DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD` | Primary-0gPD | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_PASSWORD` | Primary-0gPD | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_USERNAME` | Primary-0gPD | (secret) |
| `QUEUE_BULL_REDIS_DUALSTACK` | Primary-0gPD | true |
| `ENABLE_ALPINE_PRIVATE_NETWORKING` | Primary-0gPD | true |
| `OFFLOAD_MANUAL_EXECUTIONS_TO_WORKERS` | Primary-0gPD | true |

| `GHOST_ADMIN_NAME` | Ghost API config | Alfred |

| `GHOST_ADMIN_PASSWORD` | Ghost API config | (secret) |
| `GHOST_CONTENT_API_KEY` | Ghost API config | (secret) |
| `NC_AUTH_JWT_SECRET` | NocoDB | (secret) |
| `ENABLE_ALPINE_PRIVATE_NETWORKING` | NocoDB | true |

| `database__connection__user` | ghost | (secret) |

| `POSTGRES_DB` | vectordb | railway |

## Configuration

- **Start command:** `n8n worker`
- **Volume:** `/bitnami`
- **Healthcheck:** `/api/logo`
- **Networking:** Public domain with automatic HTTPS
- **Start command:** `/bin/sh -c "unset PGPORT; exec docker-entrypoint.sh postgres --port=${PGPORT_PRIVATE}"`
- **Volume:** `/var/lib/postgresql/data`
- **Healthcheck:** `/health`
- **Volume:** `/meili_data`
- **Start command:** `docker-entrypoint.sh mysqld --innodb-use-native-aio=0 --disable-log-bin --performance_schema=0`
- **TCP Proxies:** 3306
- **Volume:** `/var/lib/mysql`
- **Start command:** `/bin/sh -c "unset PGPORT; docker-entrypoint.sh postgres --port=5432"`
- **Start command:** `n8n start`
- **Healthcheck:** `/healthz`
- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **Healthcheck:** `/api/v1/health`
- **Start command:** `./run.sh `
- **Start command:** `docker-entrypoint.sh mongod --ipv6 --bind_ip ::,0.0.0.0`
- **Volume:** `/data/db`
- **Start command:** `/railway-alfredos-start.sh`
- **TCP Proxies:** 5432

**Category:** Other · **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, Handlebars, Shell, HTML, Smarty, Python, Dockerfile

[View on Railway →](https://railway.com/deploy/alfredos)
